_comment: - Copy this file to config/inventory.json and edit that copy (inventory.json is gitignored, so your real inventory never gets committed).
- Each object in 'items' is one item/fruit you currently own.
- 'name' must match the catalog's exact name (case-insensitive). See every valid name + its value with: python -m blox_trade_finder --list-catalog
- 'qty' is optional, defaults to 1. Set it to how many copies you own (e.g. 3 Kitsunes) so the tool can match that many separate trades.
- 'variant' is optional. Set it to "Permanent" if you own the Permanent version of a fruit
(e.g. { "name": "Portal", "variant": "Permanent" } is treated the same as writing
{ "name": "Permanent Portal" } directly — Gamersberg's catalog tracks these as two
separate items with different values). Leave it out (or set to "Physical") for the normal version.
Note: bloxfruitsvalues.com's own data doesn't distinguish Permanent from Physical at all, so this
only affects matching against Gamersberg-sourced trades.
- This '_comment' key (and any other key starting with '_') is ignored by the tool — safe to leave in or delete.
